title: 1 Reykjavik - 1 Akureyri - 1 Myvatn - 1 Egilsstadir - 1 Hofn - 1 Vik - 1 Reykjavik

day_descriptions.Day 1: Arrive Reykjavik. The world's northernmost capital is small enough to walk — Hallgrímskirkja church, the harbour, the Harpa concert hall. Overnight Reykjavik.
day_descriptions.Day 2: Drive the Golden Circle: Þingvellir National Park, the Geysir geothermal area and Gullfoss waterfall. Then north to Akureyri. Overnight Akureyri.
day_descriptions.Day 3: Lake Myvatn's otherworldly landscape — pseudo craters, lava formations, geothermal mud pools and the Dimmuborgir lava labyrinth. Overnight Myvatn.
day_descriptions.Day 4: Drive east through the dramatic highlands to the Eastfjords. Overnight Egilsstaðir.
day_descriptions.Day 5: Continue south along the ring road to Höfn, gateway to the Vatnajökull glacier and the Jökulsárlón glacier lagoon — icebergs calving into the sea. Overnight Höfn.
day_descriptions.Day 6: Drive west past black sand beaches and the remarkable Reynisfjara sea stacks to Vík. The South Coast at its most dramatic. Overnight Vík.
day_descriptions.Day 7: Return to Reykjavik via Seljalandsfoss and Skógafoss waterfalls.

description: Iceland's complete ring road: Reykjavik, Akureyri, Lake Myvatn's geothermal fields, the Eastfjords, the Jökulsárlón glacier lagoon, Vík's black beaches.
